brief_justification: Arrives at exactly 408.0 via correct sequential decay+boost logic, matching the ground truth; traces first-order decay mechanics plus second-order superposition confirmation and explains why each distractor fails; uses independent superposition cross-check as implicit self-monitoring but never names potential failure modes like off-by-one interval errors; explicitly re-derives via superposition table from a completely different angle, confirming the same result; correctly computes 408 but does not acknowledge the inconsistency that the selected option B lists '148.7' as its value, presenting the B selection without flagging this numerical contradiction; evaluates all four options with specific mechanistic reasons for each rejection; every intermediate value is shown with the factor applied, plus a complete superposition breakdown that a third party could reproduce independently
